title: [MTR3/4]Amsterdam Metro
description: This resourcepack adds Amsterdam Metro M7 Train for Minecraft Transit Railway Mod
body:
![contents](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/367e992b5f2320f48eca92e9a7fbd9f6b35f0f22.png)

## Introduction

This resource pack adds Amsterdam Metro M7 Train

This pack requires **Minecraft Transit Railway** Mod (MTR3, MTR4) and **Nemo's Transit Expansion for MTR3** (NTE)

Before using, please check the Readme included inside the pack!

## Contents

* Amsterdam Metro M7
* Rnet transport railway sign
* Metro logo eyecandies
